policy_name: Meade & Sons Construction - Job Expense Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.requirement: All expenses over $25 must have a receipt or invoice
validation_rules.notes: Photo of receipt acceptable. Digital receipts from Amazon, Home Depot preferred.

validation_rules.requirement: Fuel purchases must include station name, gallons, and price per gallon
validation_rules.notes: Must match truck or equipment usage on that date. Crew members submit within 7 days.

validation_rules.requirement: Same receipt cannot be submitted twice
validation_rules.notes: Cross-check against prior month submissions. Flag to Brendan if repeat found.

validation_rules.requirement: Food, clothing, and personal items not reimbursable
validation_rules.notes: Exceptions: crew meals on job sites running past 8 hours with Brendan or Sean approval.

validation_rules.requirement: Expenses must be submitted within 30 days of purchase
validation_rules.notes: Late submissions require Brendan sign-off and written explanation.

validation_rules.requirement: Tool or equipment purchases over $200 require prior approval
validation_rules.notes: Email or text approval from Brendan or Sean before purchase. Keep approval with receipt.

validation_rules.requirement: All permit fees must reference the job number and client name
validation_rules.notes: Attach permit confirmation email or city receipt to expense entry.

validation_rules.requirement: Sub payments are not reimbursable through expense form - use vendor bill workflow
validation_rules.notes: Alvarez Plumbing, NW Electric, Hammer & Hand, Tigard Concrete must go through QB bills.

context: Policy covers field crew (Mike Cabrera, Jake Torres, Luis Ortega) and owners (Brendan Meade, Sean Meade) submitting job-related out-of-pocket expenses. Reviewed monthly by Ayumi at the 15th invoice review session.
